collection_method: Extracted the 5,000 most recent English reviews from the Google Play Store using the 'google-play-scraper' Python library, sorted by 'NEWEST' to capture the most relevant user feedback.
cleaning_decisions: Removed duplicate reviews to ensure unique data points.
Eliminated empty entries and reviews that contained only non-textual elements.
Discarded extremely short reviews (fewer than 3 words remaining after cleaning) that lacked sufficient context for requirement derivation.
Converted all text to lowercase for normalization.
Converted numerical digits to their word equivalents to preserve semantic meaning while removing symbols.
Removed punctuation, special characters, and emojis.
Eliminated redundant whitespace to ensure consistent formatting.
Removed standard English stop words to focus on content-rich terms.
Applied WordNet lemmatization to group inflected forms of words into their base dictionary form.
Minimized the dataset to include only essential fields for traceability: reviewId, content (cleaned), score, and content_original.
